mapper.insert: insert into course(title, description, cover, teacher_id, create_time) values (#{title}, #{description}, #{cover}, #{teacherId}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select c.id, c.title, c.description, c.cover,u.nickname as teacherName, c.create_time from course c left join user u on c.teacher_id = u.id where c.title like concat('%',#{title},'%')
